is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum clinical isolates, sequencing dhfr-ts gene.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfdhfr codons 51, 59, 108 (Ile-51, Arg-59, Asn-108) among target markers.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Genotype counts given: 11 wild-type, 2 HB3-type (108), 2 K1-type (59/108), 14 W2-type (51/59/108), 5 mixed of 34 sequenced isolates.

sub_country_location.evidence: All isolates from a single city, Yaounde, Cameroon; the 34 sequenced isolates are pooled with no sub-city or site-level breakdown of genotype frequencies. Only one clinic (Nlongkak Catholic missionary dispensary) mentioned in acknowledgments but frequencies are not resolved to it separately.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Patients participated in clinical trials conducted in Yaounde between 1996 and 1998 (3-year window).

african_field_samples.evidence: 42 clinical isolates obtained by venipuncture from patients in Yaounde, Cameroon.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical study measuring in vitro responses and sequencing 42 field isolates.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Part of a series 'Molecular epidemiology of malaria in Yaounde, Cameroon. VI' with prior related studies (ref 12, Basco & Ringwald 1998) using Cameroonian isolates; samples from same recurring clinical trials in Yaounde may overlap.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary materials referenced; data are all in main text/figures but lack sub-country resolution.

assessment.summary: Primary study of 42 P. falciparum clinical isolates from Yaounde, Cameroon (1996-1998), sequencing the dhfr domain and reporting Pfdhfr codon 51/59/108 genotype counts among 34 sequenced isolates. Reports extractable frequencies and target markers within a <=3-year window, but all samples come from a single city (Yaounde) with genotype frequencies pooled and no sub-city/site-level breakdown, failing the sub-country resolution requirement.
exclusion_reasons: Frequencies can only be placed at the city/country level (Yaounde, Cameroon) with no sub-national/site-level breakdown of genotype frequencies.
